name: gen_art_dataset_1
title: Benchmark Datasets for Quorum-Sensing Consensus Evaluation: MMLU-Hard, GPQA, TruthfulQA
summary: Successfully acquired and processed three benchmark datasets for evaluating hierarchical LLM consensus protocols with confidence-calibrated veto mechanisms. The datasets include: (1) MMLU-Hard (2197 examples from 10 difficult subjects like professional_accounting and conceptual_physics), (2) GPQA (448 graduate-level questions from biology, physics, and chemistry), and (3) TruthfulQA (817 questions testing truthfulness with plausible incorrect answers). All datasets were standardized to a unified JSON schema with fields for id, question, choices, correct_answer, category, difficulty (0-1), contestedness (0-1), and metadata. The contestedness metric was computed as 1 - baseline_accuracy for MMLU-Hard, 1 - expert_accuracy for GPQA, and ratio of plausible incorrect answers for TruthfulQA. Output files include full_data_out.json (3MB, 3462 examples), mini_data_out.json (30KB, 30 examples), and preview_data_out.json (9KB, 9 examples). All files are under the 300MB size limit. The datasets are ready for evaluating quorum-sensing consensus protocols that use confidence calibration and veto mechanisms.
